text: 483 - وَ رَوَى إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَنَّ عَلِيّاً صَلَوَاتُ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ وَجَدَ قِطَعاً مِنْ مَيِّتٍ فَجُمِعَتْ ثُمَّ صَلَّى عَلَيْهَا ثُمَّ دُفِنَتْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.483 - Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), and him from his father, Imam al-Baqir: that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), once found scattered parts of a deceased person. He gathered them together, performed the funeral prayer over them, and then they were buried.
